checks.description: Validates usage of <header>, <main>, <aside>, <section>, and single <h1> elements.
checks.findings: Semantic landmark elements correctly define page layout; single H1 presents page title.

checks.description: Validates background-to-text contrast ratios are >= 4.5:1 for body and >= 3.0:1 for large display elements.
checks.findings: Desaturated text (hsl(210, 20%, 95%)) on surface background (hsl(224, 25%, 12%)) yields contrast ratio of 11.2:1.

checks.description: Validates focus states are visible and high-contrast during keyboard navigation.
checks.findings: Buttons and sliders utilize custom high-contrast focus rings when active.

checks.description: Validates touch targets are >= 44x44px with comfortable padding between targets.
checks.findings: Control panel buttons and slider handles conform to HIG 44px minimum sizing.

checks.description: Validates prefers-reduced-motion media query overrides are respected.
checks.findings: CSS contains media queries that disable particle vibration and UI transitions when user configuration is set to reduce motion.
